parameters.query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, COALESCE(SUM(wl.amount), 0) as water_intake, 2000 as water_goal, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(wl.amount), 0) < 1000 THEN 'behind' WHEN COALESCE(SUM(wl.amount), 0) >= 2000 THEN 'completed' ELSE 'on_track' END as status FROM users u LEFT JOIN water_logs wl ON u.id = wl.user_id AND DATE(wl.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE WHERE u.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY u.id, u.email, u.name
